//: Pairs allowed to exceed the 3% kit↔app parity gate. ONLY semantic/product divergences belong here — never styling drift. Every entry needs a reason and a matching section in REMAINING-DIVERGENCES.md.
deck-settings--move--light.png: Semantic divergence: the kit mock moves decks between decks (Library root / TOPIK Prep / This deck); the shipped domain moves decks between language pairs (moveDeckUseCase). Chrome and row anatomy match; only destination row text differs. See REMAINING-DIVERGENCES.md.
deck-content-choice--default--light.png: deck-content-choice is RETIRED in the kit (create_deck_change_note spec §1/§22): creation no longer asks cards-vs-nested / no Default view — that decision moved to the empty-deck screen, and creation is create-deck-firstrun / create-deck-dialog. The frozen deck-content-choice--* shot is kept ONLY as the parity reference for the app's still-shipping screen; ~6% vs the app baseline. Retire this pair once the app adopts the new create flow. See REMAINING-DIVERGENCES.md.
deck-content-choice--default--dark.png: Same as deck-content-choice--default--light: kit screen retired (superseded by create-deck-firstrun/dialog + empty-deck); frozen shot kept as the app parity reference until the app migrates. See REMAINING-DIVERGENCES.md.
